acquisition method: The acquisition of MS data was performed in DDA (data dependent acquisition) mode.
instrument: samples were analyzed using an UltiMate 3000 RSLC nano UHPLC coupled to a Thermo Scientific LTQ Orbitrap Velos.
labeling: Data analysis of the acquired label free quantitative MS data was performed using the Progenesis LC-MS software.
reduction reagent: disulfide bonds were then reduced by the addition of 10 mM TCEP at 37°C for 30 min.
reduction concentration: the addition of 10 mM TCEP at 37°C for 30 min.
